'''nagaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactivant|reactivant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactivant|reactivant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nagaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nægæbæth|nægæbæth]] || [[word:nægæbæj|nægæbæj]] || [[word:nægæbæsh|nægæbæsh]] || [[word:nægæbæ|nægæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nagagabath|nagagabath]] || [[word:nagagabaj|nagagabaj]] || [[word:nagagabash|nagagabash]] || [[word:nagagaba|nagagaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nagabath|nagabath]] || [[word:nagabaj|nagabaj]] || [[word:nagabash|nagabash]] || [[word:nagaba|nagaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nagafbath|nagafbath]] || [[word:nagafbaj|nagafbaj]] || [[word:nagafbash|nagafbash]] || [[word:nagafbaf|nagafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nagabatha|nagabatha]] || [[word:nagabaja|nagabaja]] || [[word:nagabasha|nagabasha]] || [[word:nagabaka|nagabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nagabath|nagabath]] || [[word:nagabaj|nagabaj]] || [[word:nagabash|nagabash]] || [[word:nagaba|nagaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nagabathal|nagabathal]] || [[word:nagabajal|nagabajal]] || [[word:nagabashal|nagabashal]] || [[word:nagabakal|nagabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nagabathatha|nagabathatha]] || [[word:nagabajaja|nagabajaja]] || [[word:nagabashasha|nagabashasha]] || [[word:nagabaka|nagabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nagabathan|nagabathan]] || [[word:nagabajan|nagabajan]] || [[word:nagabashan|nagabashan]] || [[word:nagabakan|nagabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nagabathaoro|nagabathaoro]] || [[word:nagabajaoro|nagabajaoro]] || [[word:nagabashaoro|nagabashaoro]] || [[word:nagabakaoro|nagabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
